_meta.title: Nestudio Production Pack V1 — Asset Generation Queue
_meta.note: The prioritized generation batch for Production Pack V1. Each entry is a prompt job that fans out to one or more assets in metadata/production-pack-v1.json (via generationPromptId). Full prompt text + negatives live in docs/asset-generation-prompt-bible.md; this file is the machine-readable queue (order, priority, targets, validation gate, human-in-the-loop steps). NO images are generated by this sprint — this is the plan a human/operator executes next.
_meta.sharedNegative: photorealism, photo, 3D render photoreal, harsh gloss, chrome, glass shine, specular highlights, plastic sheen, neon, lens flare, dramatic/sunset/night lighting, hard cast shadows, isometric, 30 degree, top-down, one-point tunnel perspective, dutch tilt, fisheye, vanishing-point convergence, baked checkerboard, transparency checkerboard pattern, white background, gray studio background, baked room/floor/wall behind object, baked floor/contact shadow, text, watermark, logo, UI, caption, signature, clutter, busy, ornate, baroque, anime, clipart, sticker-art, kawaii, Animal Crossing, Stardew, The Sims, Dreamlight look

steps: 1. Operator picks the next queue entry by priority (P0 → P1 → P2) and dependency order.
2. Compose the final prompt = docs/asset-generation-prompt-bible.md base + this entry's promptRef body + sharedNegative.
3. Generate candidate(s) at the declared master resolution.
4. For objects: cut out to true alpha (no white/gray/checkerboard); for backgrounds: keep opaque.
5. Run the validationGate below; auto-reject on any hard failure.
6. Two-reviewer Scene/Object Style Lock (visual-dna §26): pass ≥ 85, hard-gates on camera + slot-fit.
7. On approve: place under the target path, set the asset's productionStatus → approved, wire into a fixture.
workflow.humanInLoop: Every asset requires human approval before it enters the library (bible §14 — never ship raw AI to users).

batches.goal: Prove two premium production scenes end-to-end (Living Room + Home Office) with real editable-surface heroes. Smallest slice that upgrades the Golden Nest beyond the placeholder cut-outs.
Fill both scenes with lamps, plants, rugs, books, second backgrounds, pinboards, laptops/monitors.
Focus detail pack — child/projected objects + surface skins that populate the TV console / bookshelf / desk / pinboard Focus scenes. Depends on the P0 parent heroes existing + the Focus editor.

jobs.notes: Default living-room stage, wall #e6cfa9. EMPTY — no furniture. Leaves clean media/seat/table/frame/lamp/plant/rug/avatar zones; floor seam ~0.62.
Cool-tinted gallery variant, wall #ece4d6. Same camera + floor seam as warm-studio (a recolour, not a new scene).
Olive-tinted office stage, wall #e3ddca. EMPTY. Leaves clean desk/seat/media/shelf/lamp/plant/frame/pinboard/avatar zones.
Green-tinted study, wall #d8e4c6, soft window on the front wall. EMPTY stage.

editableSurface.renderMode: idle=warm-off-glass, open=glow; content composited by engine, NOT baked

jobs.notes: Screen region must be an EMPTY warm-dark matte panel (no baked video/image) so the engine composites the creator's content. Generate the idle + open (glow) states. 6 assets; laptop/monitor share the prompt with a smaller screen footprint.

editableSurface.renderMode: empty warm mat inside the frame; creator photo composited by engine

jobs.notes: The photo aperture must be an EMPTY warm mat (no baked photo). Frame/mat/molding is the asset; the photo is a composited surface.

3 seating heroes (bouclé/linen/velvet). One accent each. Front-facing, floor-standing, base-centre anchor. BLOCKED for composition until proposed 'seat' slot type is added to the contract (see plan §Open decisions).
3 chairs. Same 'seat' slot dependency as sofas.
Projection-parent tables. Tabletop must read as a clean flat surface with room for projected accessories. Depends on proposed 'table' slot.
Desk = the primary office Focus scene parent. Empty top surface (no baked laptop/mug — those are projected children). Maps to existing 'desk' slot.
Shelf Focus parent. Author with mostly-empty shelves (a few baked-in books ok as structure) so projected shelf children read. Maps to existing 'shelf' slot.
5 lamps. idle=off (warm shade), active=soft warm glow (glow baked into the shade only, NOT a cast light pool on a floor). Maps to existing 'lamp' slot.
6 plants (floor + surface + mini). Soft matte rounded leaf masses, no photoreal leaves. Maps to existing 'plant' slot.
Floor coverings — foreshortened to lie on the floor plane at the camera's ~7° tilt. Lowest z, NO contact shadow (it IS the floor layer). Depends on proposed 'rug' slot.

editableSurface.renderMode: top cover/page is a clean warm surface for a composited title/cover

jobs.notes: Books/notebooks with an editable top cover surface. Cover left blank/plain (no baked title text). Maps to existing 'books' slot.

editableSurface.renderMode: empty board; note children composited on top by the engine

jobs.notes: Cork + wire-grid boards. The board surface must be EMPTY (no baked notes/photos) so note children project onto it. Depends on proposed 'pinboard' slot (or reuse 'frame' — see plan).
Small ambient surface accessories that populate Focus scenes. Tiny — must read at 64px. Blocked on parents + Focus editor.

editableSurface.renderMode: sticky note face is a blank warm surface for composited text

jobs.notes: Pinboard children (sticky note, washi tape, push pin). No baked handwriting/text. Blocked on pinboard parent.

editableSurface.renderMode: the cover art skin itself — a matte, DNA-consistent cover design with NO title text

jobs.notes: Editable cover-surface skins (warm/sage/cobalt). M9.1 decision: STANDALONE surface assets (NestAsset category=surface, surfaceKind=cover) — see lib/fixtures/production-pack-v1.ts. Not variants.

editableSurface.renderMode: a matte placeholder photo card (soft abstract warm scene) that sits inside a frame aperture

jobs.notes: Default photo-surface skins so an empty frame reads as filled before the creator binds real content. Soft abstract, matte, DNA-consistent, no faces/text. M9.1 decision: STANDALONE surface assets (NestAsset category=surface, surfaceKind=photo) — see lib/fixtures/production-pack-v1.ts. Not variants.
